item.title: Michigan lands 7-foot-2 Cincinnati transfer Thiam
item.description: Cincinnati transfer Moustapha Thiam, one of the best available players left in the portal, has committed to Michigan, he told ESPN's Shams Charania on...

item.title: Love favored for ROY, followed by Tate, Mendoza
item.description: New Cardinals running back Jeremiyah Love is the favorite to win offensive rookie of the year ahead of Carnell Tate and Fernando Mendoza. Jets defensi...

item.title: Peterson enters NBA draft after one season at KU
item.description: Kansas star freshman Darryn Peterson is entering the 2026 NBA draft, where he is expected to be one of the top picks.

item.title: With Tiger out, Furyk leads U.S. Ryder Cup team
item.description: Jim Furyk is returning as U.S. Ryder Cup captain for the 2027 matches in Ireland, taking the role again after Tiger Woods removed himself from conside...

item.title: Alcaraz (wrist) won't defend French Open title
item.description: Two-time defending French Open champion Carlos Alcaraz won't attempt to defend his title due to a wrist injury.
